title: OCSMP
description: Origins modpack containing a variety of content and performance mods, intended for use on the Origins Community SMP.
body:
![OCSMP Season 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NCop3scR/images/4472dc5476b974cee155f906d1687079efdc4e9b.png)
The Origins Community SMP modpack is intended for use on the [OCSMP server](https://modrinth.com/server/origins-community-smp).

The pack contains a variety of different mods, including:
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
- Extra content mods such as [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- Performance mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- & more!

The modpack also includes several optional resource packs. 

In addition, the server's IP is pre-loaded into the server list with this modpack.

The server's discord is linked on the Modrinth page.
